3265410.name: Alchemist Historical Simulator
3265410.description:
Alchemist Historical Simulator transports you to the heart of medieval science and mysticism, where you take on the role of an aspiring alchemist. In a world filled with both wonder and danger, you’ll balance the practical and the mystical as you uncover the hidden truths of alchemy.
Key Features:

  • Play as an alchemist in 18th century Paris.

  • Receive visitors in your home with an alchemy lab.

  • Study their symptoms and select medicines by studying the books of ancient healers.

  • Buy ingredients at the market, create your own, grow the necessary plants in your own garden

  • Craft medicines and potions from various ingredients, based on recipes.

  • Heal visitors and earn money from it.

  • Spend money on developing your own laboratory

  • Сollect bits of knowledge from ancient books and manuscripts of alchemists of previous generations, solve symbols, allegories and ancient riddles

  • Find the recipe for the Philosopher's Stone and be the first to create it

Additional features:

  • Day and Night Duality: By day, serve your town by healing people with carefully crafted potions and remedies. By night, conduct secret experiments in the pursuit of the elusive Philosopher's Stone and the mysteries of immortality.

  • Historical Accuracy: Delve into authentic medieval alchemical practices, study ancient texts, and encounter historical figures who shaped the field.

  • Branching Storyline: The path you choose will shape your destiny. Will you pursue alchemy for wealth, power, or the betterment of mankind?

  • Risk and Reward: Experiment with different ingredient combinations—reap the benefits of success or face dangerous, sometimes explosive, failures.

  • Puzzle-Based Discovery: Decipher cryptic manuscripts and solve alchemical riddles to unlock ancient knowledge.

  • Open-Ended Gameplay: Explore a detailed medieval world, filled with challenges, opportunities, and consequences, where your choices determine the outcome of your journey.

By day, heal the sick; by night, chase the ultimate secret of the universe. Will you become a legendary master of alchemy, or will your ambitions consume you?
3265410.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
